narrative: Trump announces Iran peace deal, sparking a cross-asset surge as Middle East tensions ease — gold higher +2.48% near $4,216; equities +1.75%; DXY -0.05%; VIX 19.4. USD/JPY firms to 160.25, testing intervention levels as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry remains the dominant anchor despite the risk-on shift. EUR/USD holds 1.1571 after the first ECB hike since 2023; options market shows a 2.9pt VRP as hedging demand persists. Watch the BoJ rate decision on June 16 for hawkish policy shifts.
